prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘I wish’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來表達強烈願望，希望某件事成真或能夠發生」？

example.text: If only the hotel had a room with a sea view.

translation.zh-Hant: 要是這間飯店有海景房就好了。

meaning.en: Used to express a strong wish that something were true or could happen.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來表達強烈願望，希望某件事成真或能夠發生。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘family name’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「家族成員共同使用的姓氏」？

example.text: Please enter your last name exactly as it appears on your passport.

translation.zh-Hant: 請依照護照上的拼法填寫你的姓氏。

meaning.en: The family name shared by members of a family.
meaning.zh-Hant: 家族成員共同使用的姓氏。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘in the adjacent place’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在緊鄰的建築物、房間或地點」？

example.text: The pharmacy is next door to the hotel.

translation.zh-Hant: 藥局就在飯店隔壁。

meaning.en: In the building, room, or place immediately beside another one.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在緊鄰的建築物、房間或地點。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘again’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「再一次；又一次」？

example.text: Could you explain the refund policy once more?

translation.zh-Hant: 你可以再說明一次退款規定嗎？

meaning.en: One more time; again.
meaning.zh-Hant: 再一次；又一次。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘on a regular basis’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以固定或反覆出現的時間間隔」？

example.text: We regularly review the monthly sales figures.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們會定期檢視每月的銷售數字。

meaning.en: At consistent or repeated intervals.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以固定或反覆出現的時間間隔。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘what is left’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「其餘部分被使用、移除或毀壞後所留下的部分」？

example.text: The remains of the old wall are still visible behind the station.

translation.zh-Hant: 車站後方仍看得到舊牆的遺跡。

meaning.en: The parts that are left after the rest has been used, removed, or destroyed.
meaning.zh-Hant: 其餘部分被使用、移除或毀壞後所留下的部分。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘free time’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「不必工作或處理必要事務的空閒時間」？

example.text: She studies English in her spare time.

translation.zh-Hant: 她利用空閒時間學英文。

meaning.en: Time when you are not working or handling necessary tasks.
meaning.zh-Hant: 不必工作或處理必要事務的空閒時間。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘family name’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「放在名字之前或之後、表示家族的姓氏」？

example.text: Chen is a common surname in Taiwan.

translation.zh-Hant: 陳是臺灣常見的姓氏。

meaning.en: The family name that follows or precedes a person's given name.
meaning.zh-Hant: 放在名字之前或之後、表示家族的姓氏。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘happen’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「發生；舉行」？

example.text: The meeting will take place in the main conference room.

translation.zh-Hant: 會議將在大會議室舉行。

meaning.en: To happen or occur.
meaning.zh-Hant: 發生；舉行。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘soybean curd’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「將豆漿凝固後壓製而成的柔軟豆製品」？

example.text: This soup contains tofu and fresh vegetables.

translation.zh-Hant: 這碗湯裡有豆腐和新鮮蔬菜。

meaning.en: A soft food made by curdling soy milk and pressing the curds.
meaning.zh-Hant: 將豆漿凝固後壓製而成的柔軟豆製品。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a net-and-ball sport’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「兩隊球員將球擊過高網的團體運動」？

example.text: We play volleyball on the beach every Saturday.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們每週六都在海灘打排球。

meaning.en: A team sport in which players hit a ball over a high net.
meaning.zh-Hant: 兩隊球員將球擊過高網的團體運動。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a cooling system’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「冷卻並調節室內空氣的系統或過程；空調」？

example.text: The air conditioning in our hotel room is not working.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們飯店房間的冷氣壞了。

meaning.en: A system or process for cooling and controlling indoor air.
meaning.zh-Hant: 冷卻並調節室內空氣的系統或過程；空調。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘excessive pride’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「認為自己比別人優秀或重要的傲慢態度」？

example.text: His arrogance made teamwork difficult.

translation.zh-Hant: 他的傲慢讓團隊合作變得困難。

meaning.en: An attitude of believing that you are better or more important than others.
meaning.zh-Hant: 認為自己比別人優秀或重要的傲慢態度。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a round open container’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來盛裝或供應食物與液體的深圓形容器」？

example.text: She poured the soup into a large bowl.

translation.zh-Hant: 她把湯倒進一個大碗裡。

meaning.en: A deep, round container used for holding or serving food and liquids.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來盛裝或供應食物與液體的深圓形容器。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘deal with’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「設法妥善處理困難情況或問題」？

example.text: The team is learning how to cope with sudden changes.

translation.zh-Hant: 團隊正在學習如何應付突發變動。

meaning.en: To manage a difficult situation or problem successfully.
meaning.zh-Hant: 設法妥善處理困難情況或問題。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a nonworking day’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「不用上班或上課的一天」？

example.text: I am taking a day off next Friday.

translation.zh-Hant: 我下週五要休假一天。

meaning.en: A day when you do not have to work or attend school.
meaning.zh-Hant: 不用上班或上課的一天。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘crime investigator’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「蒐集證據以偵破案件的警員或調查人員」？

example.text: The detective interviewed everyone who witnessed the robbery.

translation.zh-Hant: 刑警詢問了每一位目擊搶案的人。

meaning.en: A police officer or investigator who gathers evidence to solve crimes.
meaning.zh-Hant: 蒐集證據以偵破案件的警員或調查人員。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘finished with’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「已經用完、處理完或不再參與某件事」？

example.text: I am done with this report and ready to send it.

translation.zh-Hant: 這份報告我已經完成，可以寄出了。

meaning.en: Finished using, dealing with, or being involved in something.
meaning.zh-Hant: 已經用完、處理完或不再參與某件事。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a diplomatic office’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「大使與外交人員辦公的官方建築或辦事處」？

example.text: She went to the embassy to replace her lost passport.

translation.zh-Hant: 她到大使館補辦遺失的護照。

meaning.en: The official building or offices where an ambassador and diplomatic staff work.
meaning.zh-Hant: 大使與外交人員辦公的官方建築或辦事處。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘do not hesitate’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來告訴某人可以放心去做某事，不必顧慮」？

example.text: Feel free to contact me if you have any questions.

translation.zh-Hant: 如果有任何問題，歡迎隨時聯絡我。

meaning.en: Used to tell someone that they may do something without hesitation.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來告訴某人可以放心去做某事，不必顧慮。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘in vain’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「沒有產生有用的結果；徒勞地、白費地」？

example.text: All our planning was for nothing when the event was canceled.

translation.zh-Hant: 活動取消後，我們先前的規劃全都白費了。

meaning.en: Without producing a useful result; in vain.
meaning.zh-Hant: 沒有產生有用的結果；徒勞地、白費地。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘the upper face’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「眉毛上方、髮際線下方的臉部區域」？

example.text: He touched her forehead to check for a fever.

translation.zh-Hant: 他摸了摸她的額頭，看看有沒有發燒。

meaning.en: The part of the face above the eyebrows and below the hairline.
meaning.zh-Hant: 眉毛上方、髮際線下方的臉部區域。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a large amount’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「某事物很大的數量、程度或份量」？

example.text: We learned a great deal from the customer survey.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們從顧客調查中學到很多。

meaning.en: A large amount, number, or degree of something.
meaning.zh-Hant: 某事物很大的數量、程度或份量。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘in the distant past’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在很久以前」？

example.text: This temple was built long ago.

translation.zh-Hant: 這座寺廟是很久以前建造的。

meaning.en: At a time far in the past.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在很久以前。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘shopping center’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「集合許多商店與服務的大型建築或區域」？

example.text: There is a food court on the top floor of the mall.

translation.zh-Hant: 購物中心頂樓有美食街。

meaning.en: A large building or area containing many stores and services.
meaning.zh-Hant: 集合許多商店與服務的大型建築或區域。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a hard conductive material’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「如鐵或鋁，通常堅硬、有光澤且能導熱或導電的材料」？

example.text: The suitcase has a strong metal frame.

translation.zh-Hant: 這個行李箱有堅固的金屬框架。

meaning.en: A material such as iron or aluminum that is usually hard, shiny, and able to conduct heat or electricity.
meaning.zh-Hant: 如鐵或鋁，通常堅硬、有光澤且能導熱或導電的材料。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘the gas we breathe’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「空氣中無色、供人與動物維持生命所需的氣體」？

example.text: The patient was given oxygen through a mask.

translation.zh-Hant: 病人透過面罩接受氧氣。

meaning.en: A colorless gas in the air that people and animals need in order to live.
meaning.zh-Hant: 空氣中無色、供人與動物維持生命所需的氣體。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a card game’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「玩家下注，比較誰的手牌組合最強的一種紙牌遊戲」？

example.text: They played poker after dinner.

translation.zh-Hant: 他們晚餐後玩撲克牌。

meaning.en: A card game in which players bet on who has the strongest hand.
meaning.zh-Hant: 玩家下注，比較誰的手牌組合最強的一種紙牌遊戲。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘software developer’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「撰寫並維護電腦程式的人」？

example.text: The programmer fixed the payment bug before launch.

translation.zh-Hant: 程式設計師在上線前修好了付款功能的錯誤。

meaning.en: A person who writes and maintains computer programs.
meaning.zh-Hant: 撰寫並維護電腦程式的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘very quickly’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以很快的速度」？

example.text: Online sales grew rapidly last year.

translation.zh-Hant: 去年的線上銷售快速成長。

meaning.en: At a fast rate or speed.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以很快的速度。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a large sports venue’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「設有多排座位、供觀賞運動或其他活動的大型場地」？

example.text: The concert will be held at the city stadium.

translation.zh-Hant: 演唱會將在市立體育場舉行。

meaning.en: A large venue with rows of seats for watching sports or other events.
meaning.zh-Hant: 設有多排座位、供觀賞運動或其他活動的大型場地。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘with success’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以達成預期結果的方式；成功地」？

example.text: We successfully completed the system upgrade.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們順利完成了系統升級。

meaning.en: In a way that achieves the intended result.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以達成預期結果的方式；成功地。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a person who swims’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「游泳的人，尤其指以運動或健身為目的者」？

example.text: She is a strong swimmer and trains every morning.

translation.zh-Hant: 她很會游泳，而且每天早上訓練。

meaning.en: A person who swims, especially for sport or exercise.
meaning.zh-Hant: 游泳的人，尤其指以運動或健身為目的者。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘vegetable’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「vegetable 的非正式說法，指蔬菜」？

example.text: Add some fresh veggies to the noodles.

translation.zh-Hant: 在麵裡加一些新鮮蔬菜。

meaning.en: An informal word for a vegetable.
meaning.zh-Hant: vegetable 的非正式說法，指蔬菜。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘would have’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「would have 的縮寫，用來表示未實現或有條件的過去情況」？

example.text: I would've called you if I had known about the delay.

translation.zh-Hant: 如果我知道有延誤，我本來會打電話給你。

meaning.en: The contraction of would have, used for an unreal or conditional past situation.
meaning.zh-Hant: would have 的縮寫，用來表示未實現或有條件的過去情況。

plainExpression: a student in the same class

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a student in the same class’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「與另一位學生在同一班上課的人」？

example.text: My classmate shared her notes with me.

translation.zh-Hant: 我的同學把她的筆記分享給我。

meaning.en: A person who studies in the same class as another student.
meaning.zh-Hant: 與另一位學生在同一班上課的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘due date’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「某件事必須完成的最晚時間或日期」？

example.text: The deadline for the proposal is Friday afternoon.

translation.zh-Hant: 提案的截止時間是星期五下午。

meaning.en: The latest time or date by which something must be completed.
meaning.zh-Hant: 某件事必須完成的最晚時間或日期。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘still growing or changing’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「仍在成長、變化或逐步進展中的」？

example.text: The team is closely monitoring the developing situation.

translation.zh-Hant: 團隊正密切關注持續發展的情勢。

meaning.en: Still growing, changing, or becoming more advanced.
meaning.zh-Hant: 仍在成長、變化或逐步進展中的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘from then until now’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「從過去某個時間起一直持續到現在」？

example.text: I met her at university and we have worked together ever since.

translation.zh-Hant: 我在大學認識她，此後我們一直共事。

meaning.en: Continuously from a particular past time until now.
meaning.zh-Hant: 從過去某個時間起一直持續到現在。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a refillable ink pen’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「內有儲墨槽、將液態墨水送到筆尖的筆」？

example.text: He signed the contract with a fountain pen.

translation.zh-Hant: 他用鋼筆簽了合約。

meaning.en: A pen with a reservoir that supplies liquid ink to a nib.
meaning.zh-Hant: 內有儲墨槽、將液態墨水送到筆尖的筆。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘often’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「經常；以短暫或反覆的間隔發生」？

example.text: This train is frequently delayed during rush hour.

translation.zh-Hant: 這班火車在尖峰時段經常誤點。

meaning.en: Often; at short or repeated intervals.
meaning.zh-Hant: 經常；以短暫或反覆的間隔發生。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘juice made from fruit’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「從水果榨取汁液製成的飲料」？

example.text: Breakfast includes coffee, tea, or fruit juice.

translation.zh-Hant: 早餐附咖啡、茶或果汁。

meaning.en: A drink made from the liquid extracted from fruit.
meaning.zh-Hant: 從水果榨取汁液製成的飲料。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a pungent cooking bulb’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「烹調時用來調味、氣味濃烈的球莖食材」？

example.text: Fry the garlic before adding the vegetables.

translation.zh-Hant: 加入蔬菜前先把大蒜炒香。

meaning.en: A strongly flavored bulb used as a seasoning in cooking.
meaning.zh-Hant: 烹調時用來調味、氣味濃烈的球莖食材。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘in general’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來表示某個說法在大多數情況下成立」？

example.text: Generally speaking, weekday flights are cheaper.

translation.zh-Hant: 一般來說，平日的航班比較便宜。

meaning.en: Used to say that a statement is true in most cases.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來表示某個說法在大多數情況下成立。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘enter’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「進入某個場所、車輛或封閉空間」？

example.text: Please get into the taxi at the front entrance.

translation.zh-Hant: 請在正門口上計程車。

meaning.en: To enter a place, vehicle, or enclosed space.
meaning.zh-Hant: 進入某個場所、車輛或封閉空間。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a morning greeting’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「早上見到他人時使用的問候語」？

example.text: Good morning, everyone. Let us begin the meeting.

translation.zh-Hant: 各位早安，我們開始開會吧。

meaning.en: A greeting used when meeting someone in the morning.
meaning.zh-Hant: 早上見到他人時使用的問候語。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘fortunately’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來表示某件事發生或為真是幸運的」？

example.text: Good thing we booked the tickets in advance.

translation.zh-Hant: 還好我們事先訂了票。

meaning.en: Used to say that it is fortunate that something happened or is true.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來表示某件事發生或為真是幸運的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘enjoy yourself’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來祝福某人玩得開心或享受過程」？

example.text: Have fun on your trip to Hualien!

translation.zh-Hant: 祝你花蓮之旅玩得開心！

meaning.en: Used to wish someone an enjoyable experience.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來祝福某人玩得開心或享受過程。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘place’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「特定的地點或位置」？

example.text: The app needs permission to use your location.

translation.zh-Hant: 這個 App 需要取得權限才能存取你的位置資訊。

meaning.en: A particular place or position.
meaning.zh-Hant: 特定的地點或位置。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘usually’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在一般情況下；通常」？

example.text: The store normally closes at nine.

translation.zh-Hant: 這家店通常九點關門。

meaning.en: Under usual conditions or in most cases.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在一般情況下；通常。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘since this is now true’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「因為情況已改變或某件事現在已成為事實」？

example.text: Now that everyone is here, we can start the presentation.

translation.zh-Hant: 既然大家都到了，我們可以開始簡報。

meaning.en: Because a situation has changed or a fact is now true.
meaning.zh-Hant: 因為情況已改變或某件事現在已成為事實。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘extra work hours’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「超出正常工時之外的工作時間」？

example.text: The company will pay overtime for weekend work.

translation.zh-Hant: 公司會為週末工作支付加班費。

meaning.en: Time worked beyond a person's regular working hours.
meaning.zh-Hant: 超出正常工時之外的工作時間。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘hair tied at the back’?

example.text: The two departments must work together to meet the deadline.

translation.zh-Hant: 這兩個部門必須合作才能如期完成。

meaning.en: To cooperate with other people to achieve a shared goal.
meaning.zh-Hant: 與他人合作，以達成共同目標。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a cultured milk food’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以細菌發酵牛奶製成、質地濃稠且略帶酸味的食品；優格」？

example.text: I usually eat yogurt with fruit for breakfast.

translation.zh-Hant: 我早餐通常吃加了水果的優格。

meaning.en: A thick, slightly sour food made by fermenting milk with bacteria.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以細菌發酵牛奶製成、質地濃稠且略帶酸味的食品；優格。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘Japanese animated works’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「源自日本的動畫電影或電視節目；日本動畫」？

example.text: We watched an anime about a young chef last night.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們昨晚看了一部關於年輕廚師的日本動畫。

meaning.en: Animated films or television programs originating in Japan.
meaning.zh-Hant: 源自日本的動畫電影或電視節目；日本動畫。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a building design professional’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「設計建築物並製作施工圖的專業人士；建築師」？

example.text: The architect showed us the plans for the new library.

translation.zh-Hant: 建築師向我們展示新圖書館的設計圖。

meaning.en: A professional who designs buildings and prepares plans for their construction.
meaning.zh-Hant: 設計建築物並製作施工圖的專業人士；建築師。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘make unable to pay debts’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「使某人或組織破產，無力償債」？

example.text: A prolonged legal battle could bankrupt the company.

translation.zh-Hant: 漫長的法律訴訟可能使這家公司破產。

meaning.en: To make a person or organization unable to pay its debts.
meaning.zh-Hant: 使某人或組織破產，無力償債。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘fully oxidized tea’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「茶葉在乾燥前經過充分氧化所製成的茶；紅茶」？

example.text: He ordered black tea with a slice of lemon.

translation.zh-Hant: 他點了一杯加檸檬片的紅茶。

meaning.en: Tea made from leaves that have been fully oxidized before drying.
meaning.zh-Hant: 茶葉在乾燥前經過充分氧化所製成的茶；紅茶。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘cooked in hot water’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在沸騰的水或其他液體中煮熟的」？

example.text: The breakfast includes a boiled egg and toast.

translation.zh-Hant: 這份早餐包含一顆水煮蛋和吐司。

meaning.en: Cooked in water or another liquid at its boiling point.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在沸騰的水或其他液體中煮熟的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a program for viewing websites’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來開啟及瀏覽網站和其他網路內容的電腦程式；瀏覽器」？

example.text: Open the link in your browser to complete the form.

translation.zh-Hant: 請在瀏覽器中開啟連結以填完表單。

meaning.en: A computer program used to open and view websites and other online content.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來開啟及瀏覽網站和其他網路內容的電腦程式；瀏覽器。

plainExpression: a religion based on Buddha's teachings

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a religion based on Buddha's teachings’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以佛陀教誨為基礎的宗教與哲學；佛教」？

example.text: She studied Buddhism while traveling in Asia.

translation.zh-Hant: 她在亞洲旅行時研習佛教。

meaning.en: The religion and philosophy based on the teachings of the Buddha.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以佛陀教誨為基礎的宗教與哲學；佛教。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a cafe serving drinks’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「供應咖啡、其他飲料及簡餐的小型咖啡館」？

example.text: Let's meet at the coffee shop across from the station.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們在車站對面的咖啡店見面吧。

meaning.en: A small café that serves coffee, other drinks, and often light food.
meaning.zh-Hant: 供應咖啡、其他飲料及簡餐的小型咖啡館。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘frequently or usually’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以經常發生或許多人通常採用的方式」？

example.text: This phrase is commonly used in business emails.

translation.zh-Hant: 這個片語常用在商務電子郵件中。

meaning.en: In a way that happens often or is usual among many people.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以經常發生或許多人通常採用的方式。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘taking into account’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在判斷時把特定事實或情況納入考量」？

example.text: Considering the traffic, we should leave early.

translation.zh-Hant: 考量到交通狀況，我們應該早點出發。

meaning.en: Taking a particular fact or situation into account when making a judgment.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在判斷時把特定事實或情況納入考量。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘fail to meet someone's hopes’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「因未符合期待或希望而使某人感到失望」？

example.text: I don't want to disappoint the clients by missing the deadline.

translation.zh-Hant: 我不想因為錯過期限而讓客戶失望。

meaning.en: To make someone feel unhappy because an expectation or hope was not met.
meaning.zh-Hant: 因未符合期待或希望而使某人感到失望。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘without any payment’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「不必支付任何費用；免費」？

example.text: Hotel guests can use the gym for free.

translation.zh-Hant: 飯店住客可以免費使用健身房。

meaning.en: Without having to pay any money.
meaning.zh-Hant: 不必支付任何費用；免費。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘available to purchase’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「可供購買的；待售」？

example.text: The house next door is for sale.

translation.zh-Hant: 隔壁的房子正在出售。

meaning.en: Available to be bought.
meaning.zh-Hant: 可供購買的；待售。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘clean outdoor atmosphere’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「戶外的乾淨空氣，尤指相對於室內空氣而言；新鮮空氣」？

example.text: We opened the windows to let in some fresh air.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們打開窗戶，讓一些新鮮空氣進來。

meaning.en: Clean outdoor air, especially when compared with the air inside a building.
meaning.zh-Hant: 戶外的乾淨空氣，尤指相對於室內空氣而言；新鮮空氣。

primarySenseID: en:identification as a man, a woman, or something else

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a person's social identity category’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一個人認同為男性、女性或其他性別的身分，以及與該身分相關的社會角色」？

example.text: The form lets each applicant state their gender.

translation.zh-Hant: 這份表格讓每位申請人填寫自己的性別。

senses.id: en:identification as a man, a woman, or something else

meaning.en: A person's identity as a man, a woman, or another gender, including the social roles associated with that identity.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一個人認同為男性、女性或其他性別的身分，以及與該身分相關的社會角色。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘recover from or overcome’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「從疾病、失望、恐懼或其他困難中恢復或克服它」？

example.text: It took her a few days to get over the cold.

translation.zh-Hant: 她花了幾天才從感冒中恢復。

meaning.en: To recover from an illness, disappointment, fear, or other difficulty.
meaning.zh-Hant: 從疾病、失望、恐懼或其他困難中恢復或克服它。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘welcome positive information’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「令人高興、正面或幸運的消息；好消息」？

example.text: The good news is that your application was approved.

translation.zh-Hant: 好消息是你的申請已獲批准。

meaning.en: Information about something positive, welcome, or fortunate.
meaning.zh-Hant: 令人高興、正面或幸運的消息；好消息。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘having moist air’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「空氣中含有大量水氣的；濕度高的」？

example.text: Taipei can be hot and humid in summer.

translation.zh-Hant: 臺北夏天可能既炎熱又潮濕。

meaning.en: Containing a high amount of moisture in the air.
meaning.zh-Hant: 空氣中含有大量水氣的；濕度高的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘pay no attention to’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「故意不理會某人或某事」？

example.text: Please don't ignore the safety warning.

translation.zh-Hant: 請不要忽視這項安全警告。

meaning.en: To deliberately pay no attention to someone or something.
meaning.zh-Hant: 故意不理會某人或某事。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘decorative personal ornaments’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「人們佩戴的戒指、項鍊、手環等裝飾品；珠寶飾品」？

example.text: She keeps her jewelry in a locked drawer.

translation.zh-Hant: 她把珠寶飾品放在上鎖的抽屜裡。

meaning.en: Decorative items such as rings, necklaces, and bracelets that people wear.
meaning.zh-Hant: 人們佩戴的戒指、項鍊、手環等裝飾品；珠寶飾品。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘one thousand grams’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「kilogram 的口語簡稱，等於一千公克；公斤」？

example.text: I bought a kilo of rice at the market.

translation.zh-Hant: 我在市場買了一公斤的米。

meaning.en: An informal short form of kilogram, equal to one thousand grams.
meaning.zh-Hant: kilogram 的口語簡稱，等於一千公克；公斤。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘school for young children’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「幼兒進入小學前就讀的學校或班級；幼兒園」？

example.text: Their daughter starts kindergarten next month.

translation.zh-Hant: 他們的女兒下個月開始上幼兒園。

meaning.en: A school or class for young children before they begin primary school.
meaning.zh-Hant: 幼兒進入小學前就讀的學校或班級；幼兒園。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a romantic written message’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為了向某人表達愛意而寫的信；情書」？

example.text: He wrote a love letter to his partner while they were apart.

translation.zh-Hant: 兩人分隔兩地時，他寫了一封情書給伴侶。

meaning.en: A letter written to express romantic love for someone.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為了向某人表達愛意而寫的信；情書。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘form new friendships’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「與他人建立友好的關係；交朋友」？

example.text: Joining a club is a good way to make friends.

translation.zh-Hant: 參加社團是結交朋友的好方法。

meaning.en: To form friendly relationships with other people.
meaning.zh-Hant: 與他人建立友好的關係；交朋友。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘medicine used for treatment’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用於治療或預防疾病及健康問題的藥物」？

example.text: Take this medication after breakfast each morning.

translation.zh-Hant: 每天早上早餐後服用這種藥。

meaning.en: Medicine used to treat or prevent an illness or health condition.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用於治療或預防疾病及健康問題的藥物。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a cinema building’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「向觀眾放映電影的建築物或廳室；電影院」？

example.text: The movie theater is within walking distance of the hotel.

translation.zh-Hant: 那間電影院從飯店步行即可抵達。

meaning.en: A building or room where films are shown to an audience.
meaning.zh-Hant: 向觀眾放映電影的建築物或廳室；電影院。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘short for nobody is’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「“nobody is” 的縮寫形式，表示「沒有人是」或「沒有人正在」」？

example.text: Nobody's at the front desk right now.

translation.zh-Hant: 目前櫃檯沒有人。

meaning.en: A contraction of “nobody is.”
meaning.zh-Hant: “nobody is” 的縮寫形式，表示「沒有人是」或「沒有人正在」。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘not completely or exactly’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「不完全、不十分精確，或尚未達到預期程度」？

example.text: The room is not quite ready for guests yet.

translation.zh-Hant: 這個房間還沒有完全準備好接待住客。

meaning.en: Not completely, exactly, or to the expected degree.
meaning.zh-Hant: 不完全、不十分精確，或尚未達到預期程度。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘on the strict condition that’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「只有在某個必要條件成立時，某事才會發生或成立」？

example.text: You can change the booking only if a seat is available.

translation.zh-Hant: 只有在還有座位時，你才能更改訂位。

meaning.en: Used to state the necessary condition for something to happen or be true.
meaning.zh-Hant: 只有在某個必要條件成立時，某事才會發生或成立。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘at the beginning’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一開始，或在後來的改變發生之前；原本」？

example.text: The meeting was originally scheduled for Monday.

translation.zh-Hant: 這場會議原本排在星期一。

meaning.en: At first or before later changes took place.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一開始，或在後來的改變發生之前；原本。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a seed-holding case’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「包住豌豆、豆類等植物種子的莢；豆莢」？

example.text: She opened the pod and removed the peas.

translation.zh-Hant: 她剝開豆莢，取出裡面的豌豆。

meaning.en: A case that holds the seeds of plants such as peas or beans.
meaning.zh-Hant: 包住豌豆、豆類等植物種子的莢；豆莢。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a young dog’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「年幼的狗；小狗」？

example.text: The puppy fell asleep beside its water bowl.

translation.zh-Hant: 小狗在水碗旁睡著了。

meaning.en: A young dog.
meaning.zh-Hant: 年幼的狗；小狗。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a public toilet room’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「公共場所中設有馬桶和洗手台的房間；洗手間」？

example.text: Could you tell me where the nearest restroom is?

translation.zh-Hant: 可以告訴我最近的洗手間在哪裡嗎？

meaning.en: A room in a public place that contains toilets and sinks.
meaning.zh-Hant: 公共場所中設有馬桶和洗手台的房間；洗手間。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a programmable task machine’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「可透過程式控制並自動執行實體任務的機器；機器人」？

example.text: The factory uses a robot to lift heavy boxes.

translation.zh-Hant: 這座工廠使用機器人搬運重箱子。

meaning.en: A programmable machine that can carry out physical tasks automatically.
meaning.zh-Hant: 可透過程式控制並自動執行實體任務的機器；機器人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a body orbiting another’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「沿軌道繞行星或其他較大天體運行的自然天體；衛星」？

example.text: The Moon is Earth's only natural satellite.

translation.zh-Hant: 月球是地球唯一的天然衛星。

meaning.en: A natural body that moves in an orbit around a planet or another larger body.
meaning.zh-Hant: 沿軌道繞行星或其他較大天體運行的自然天體；衛星。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘summon someone or request something’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「派人請某人前來，或要求把某物送來」？

example.text: The hotel manager offered to send for a doctor.

translation.zh-Hant: 飯店經理表示可以派人去請醫師。

meaning.en: To ask for someone to come or for something to be brought.
meaning.zh-Hant: 派人請某人前來，或要求把某物送來。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘state in an organized way’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「清楚且詳細地說明或列出事實、條款或計畫，尤指以書面方式」？

example.text: The contract will set out each party's responsibilities.

translation.zh-Hant: 合約會清楚列出各方的責任。

meaning.en: To explain or present facts, terms, or plans clearly and in detail, especially in writing.
meaning.zh-Hant: 清楚且詳細地說明或列出事實、條款或計畫，尤指以書面方式。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘an insufficient supply’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「所需的某項事物供應不足的情況；短缺」？

example.text: The flight was delayed because of a staff shortage.

translation.zh-Hant: 這班航班因人力短缺而延誤。

meaning.en: A situation in which there is not enough of something that is needed.
meaning.zh-Hant: 所需的某項事物供應不足的情況；短缺。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a flat kitchen utensil’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「前端寬而扁平、用來鏟起、翻面或攪拌食物的廚房用具；鍋鏟」？

example.text: Use a spatula to turn the pancakes over.

translation.zh-Hant: 用鍋鏟把鬆餅翻面。

meaning.en: A kitchen utensil with a broad, flat end used for lifting, turning, or stirring food.
meaning.zh-Hant: 前端寬而扁平、用來鏟起、翻面或攪拌食物的廚房用具；鍋鏟。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘tinted protective eyewear’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「配有深色鏡片、用來保護眼睛免受強烈陽光刺激的眼鏡；太陽眼鏡」？

example.text: Don't forget to take your sunglasses to the beach.

translation.zh-Hant: 去海邊別忘了帶太陽眼鏡。

meaning.en: Glasses with darkened lenses worn to protect the eyes from bright sunlight.
meaning.zh-Hant: 配有深色鏡片、用來保護眼睛免受強烈陽光刺激的眼鏡；太陽眼鏡。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘short for that will’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「“that will” 的縮寫形式，表示「那將會」」？

example.text: That'll give us enough time to catch the train.

translation.zh-Hant: 那樣我們就有足夠時間趕上火車。

meaning.en: A contraction of “that will.”
meaning.zh-Hant: “that will” 的縮寫形式，表示「那將會」。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘clothing worn beneath outer clothes’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「貼身穿在其他衣物裡面的服裝；內衣褲」？

example.text: Pack enough underwear for the entire trip.

translation.zh-Hant: 請帶足夠整趟旅程穿的內衣褲。

meaning.en: Clothing worn next to the skin under other clothes.
meaning.zh-Hant: 貼身穿在其他衣物裡面的服裝；內衣褲。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘an entrance route’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「進入某個地方所使用的路線或入口」？

example.text: We found a way in through the side entrance.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們找到從側門進去的路。

meaning.en: A route or opening used to enter a place.
meaning.zh-Hant: 進入某個地方所使用的路線或入口。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a baked fruit dessert’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以蘋果為內餡，通常加糖和香料調味的派；蘋果派」？

example.text: They served warm apple pie after dinner.

translation.zh-Hant: 晚餐後他們端上熱蘋果派。

meaning.en: A pie filled with apples, usually sweetened and flavored with spices.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以蘋果為內餡，通常加糖和香料調味的派；蘋果派。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘in a way suggesting that’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來描述看似為真、但實際上未必如此的情況；好像、彷彿」？

example.text: He spoke as though he already knew the answer.

translation.zh-Hant: 他說話的樣子彷彿早已知道答案。

meaning.en: Used to describe a situation that appears to be true, whether or not it actually is.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來描述看似為真、但實際上未必如此的情況；好像、彷彿。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a passenger motor vehicle’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「由引擎驅動、通常有四個輪子並可搭載少數乘客的道路車輛；汽車」？

example.text: The museum displays an automobile from the 1920s.

translation.zh-Hant: 這座博物館展示一輛 1920 年代的汽車。

meaning.en: A road vehicle with an engine, usually four wheels, and space for a small number of passengers.
meaning.zh-Hant: 由引擎驅動、通常有四個輪子並可搭載少數乘客的道路車輛；汽車。

plainExpression: in an attractive or skillful manner

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘in an attractive or skillful manner’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以非常美觀、令人愉悅或技巧純熟的方式」？

example.text: The small garden was beautifully designed.

translation.zh-Hant: 這座小花園設計得非常漂亮。

meaning.en: In a way that is very attractive, pleasing, or skillfully done.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以非常美觀、令人愉悅或技巧純熟的方式。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘cloth covering a mattress’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來覆蓋床墊或鋪在床上的大塊布；床單」？

translation.zh-Hant: 飯店立刻更換了有污漬的床單。

meaning.en: A large piece of cloth used to cover a mattress or as a layer on a bed.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來覆蓋床墊或鋪在床上的大塊布；床單。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a self-service dining place’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「顧客在櫃檯選取餐點後自行端到座位的餐廳；自助式餐廳」？

example.text: Employees can buy lunch in the company cafeteria.

translation.zh-Hant: 員工可以在公司餐廳購買午餐。

meaning.en: A restaurant where customers choose food from a counter and carry it to their tables.
meaning.zh-Hant: 顧客在櫃檯選取餐點後自行端到座位的餐廳；自助式餐廳。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘require or make necessary’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「需要某種特定行動、特質或回應」？

example.text: This situation may call for a different approach.

translation.zh-Hant: 這種情況可能需要採取不同的方法。

meaning.en: To require a particular action, quality, or response.
meaning.zh-Hant: 需要某種特定行動、特質或回應。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a gift for the holiday’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在聖誕節送給某人的禮物；聖誕禮物」？

example.text: She bought a Christmas present for each child.

translation.zh-Hant: 她為每個孩子買了一份聖誕禮物。

meaning.en: A gift given to someone at Christmas.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在聖誕節送給某人的禮物；聖誕禮物。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a person who writes music’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「創作音樂的人，尤指以此為職業者；作曲家」？

example.text: The composer wrote the music for the entire film.

translation.zh-Hant: 這位作曲家為整部電影創作配樂。

meaning.en: A person who creates music, especially as a profession.
meaning.zh-Hant: 創作音樂的人，尤指以此為職業者；作曲家。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘an abstract general idea’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來理解、解釋或組織某事物的一般性想法；概念」？

example.text: The designer explained the concept behind the new logo.

translation.zh-Hant: 設計師說明了新標誌背後的概念。

meaning.en: A general idea used to understand, explain, or organize something.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來理解、解釋或組織某事物的一般性想法；概念。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a hair-softening product’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「洗髮後使用、讓頭髮更柔順好整理的產品；潤髮乳」？

translation.zh-Hant: 讓潤髮乳在頭髮上停留兩分鐘。

meaning.en: A product applied after shampoo to make hair softer and easier to manage.
meaning.zh-Hant: 洗髮後使用、讓頭髮更柔順好整理的產品；潤髮乳。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a style of preparing food’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「與某個國家、地區或文化相關的特色烹調風格；料理」？

translation.zh-Hant: 這趟行程包含一家以當地料理聞名的餐廳。

meaning.en: A characteristic style of cooking associated with a country, region, or culture.
meaning.zh-Hant: 與某個國家、地區或文化相關的特色烹調風格；料理。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘an entrance alert device’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「訪客在門口用來通知屋內有人來訪的鈴或電子裝置；門鈴」？

example.text: Please ring the doorbell when you arrive.

translation.zh-Hant: 你抵達時請按門鈴。

meaning.en: A bell or electronic device used by visitors to signal that they are at a door.
meaning.zh-Hant: 訪客在門口用來通知屋內有人來訪的鈴或電子裝置；門鈴。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a student residence building’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「dormitory 的口語簡稱，指學生居住的宿舍建築」？

translation.zh-Hant: 她的宿舍離圖書館只有一小段路。

meaning.en: An informal short form of dormitory, a building where students live.
meaning.zh-Hant: dormitory 的口語簡稱，指學生居住的宿舍建築。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘transfer data to a device’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「把遠端系統中的資料或檔案複製到電腦或其他裝置」？

example.text: You can download the boarding pass to your phone.

translation.zh-Hant: 你可以把登機證下載到手機。

meaning.en: To copy data or a file from a remote system to a computer or other device.
meaning.zh-Hant: 把遠端系統中的資料或檔案複製到電腦或其他裝置。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a family line of rulers’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「同一家族連續統治國家的一系列君主；王朝」？

example.text: The museum has an exhibition about the Ming dynasty.

translation.zh-Hant: 這座博物館有一場關於明朝的展覽。

meaning.en: A series of rulers from the same family who govern a country over time.
meaning.zh-Hant: 同一家族連續統治國家的一系列君主；王朝。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘dine at a restaurant’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「不在家裡，而是在餐廳用餐；外食」？

translation.zh-Hant: 我們通常星期五晚上外出用餐。

meaning.en: To eat a meal at a restaurant instead of at home.
meaning.zh-Hant: 不在家裡，而是在餐廳用餐；外食。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘necessary tools and items’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「進行特定活動或達成某種用途所需的工具、機器或其他物品；設備」？

translation.zh-Hant: 租金包含所有必要的滑雪裝備。

meaning.en: The tools, machines, or other items needed for a particular activity or purpose.
meaning.zh-Hant: 進行特定活動或達成某種用途所需的工具、機器或其他物品；設備。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘permanently and finally’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「永久地，不打算或預期回到原來的狀況」？

translation.zh-Hant: 在國外住了十年後，她回家定居。

meaning.en: Permanently, with no intention or expectation of returning to the previous situation.
meaning.zh-Hant: 永久地，不打算或預期回到原來的狀況。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘water with very little salt’?

translation.zh-Hant: 這座島的淡水供應有限。

meaning.zh-Hant: 含有極少溶解鹽分的水，例如河川和湖泊中的水；淡水。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘softly and with little force’?

translation.zh-Hant: 輕輕按下按鈕，以免損壞。

meaning.en: In a soft, careful way that uses little force.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以輕柔、謹慎且不太用力的方式。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘improve or recover’?

translation.zh-Hant: 持續練習後，你的發音會進步。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘endure and successfully finish’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「成功撐過或完成一段困難的經歷、時期或任務」？

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a long-necked African animal’?

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「繼續進行或開始某項行動或計畫」？

translation.zh-Hant: 經理要我們繼續推動這項提案。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a heroic or righteous character’?

meaning.zh-Hant: 和某人一起，或在某個地方輕鬆地消磨時間。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘diligent and industrious’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「工作認真且非常努力的；勤奮的」？

translation.zh-Hant: 她是位勤奮的員工，總能如期完成工作。

meaning.zh-Hant: 工作認真且非常努力的；勤奮的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a protective head covering’?

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘at that exact moment’?

meaning.en: At that precise moment in the past.

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘remain silent’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「保持安靜或避免發出聲音」？

translation.zh-Hant: 簡報進行時請保持安靜。

meaning.en: To remain silent or avoid making noise.
meaning.zh-Hant: 保持安靜或避免發出聲音。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘be alert to danger’?

translation.zh-Hant: 吸菸會大幅增加罹患肺癌的風險。

meaning.zh-Hant: 從單側或雙側肺部組織開始生長的癌症；肺癌。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a box for posting mail’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「放入信件等郵件、供郵務人員收取並遞送的箱子；郵筒」？

translation.zh-Hant: 我把明信片投入車站外的郵筒。

meaning.zh-Hant: 放入信件等郵件、供郵務人員收取並遞送的箱子；郵筒。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a seasoned rice dish’?

meaning.zh-Hant: 把米或其他穀物放入調味高湯中烹煮，並常加入蔬菜或肉類的料理；抓飯。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a tropical fruit’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「果肉香甜呈黃色、外皮堅硬帶刺的大型熱帶水果」？

translation.zh-Hant: 我們午餐後點了新鮮鳳梨。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「根據現有資訊說明自己認為未來會發生什麼事」？

plainExpression: a bar serving drinks and food

translation.zh-Hant: 我們在車站附近一間安靜的酒館吃晚餐。

meaning.zh-Hant: 尤指英國或愛爾蘭供應酒類、通常也供應餐點的酒館。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘the side on the right’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「相對於左側的右側」？

example.text: The hotel entrance is on the right side of the building.

translation.zh-Hant: 飯店入口在建築物的右側。

meaning.en: The side that is to the right rather than the left.
meaning.zh-Hant: 相對於左側的右側。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘guitar-based popular music’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「節奏強烈、常使用電吉他與鼓的廣義流行音樂類型」？

translation.zh-Hant: 我的室友喜歡在運動時聽搖滾音樂。

meaning.zh-Hant: 節奏強烈、常使用電吉他與鼓的廣義流行音樂類型。

plainExpression: a person who shares a home

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「與另一個人共住同一房間或住處的人；室友」？

translation.zh-Hant: 我和室友平均分攤房租。

meaning.zh-Hant: 與另一個人共住同一房間或住處的人；室友。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a journey there and back’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「前往目的地後再回到出發地的往返行程」？

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a figure made of snow’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用壓實的雪堆成人形的雪人」？

example.text: The children built a snowman in the park.

translation.zh-Hant: 孩子們在公園裡堆了一個雪人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘completely wet’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「被水或其他液體徹底弄濕的」？

meaning.zh-Hant: 被水或其他液體徹底弄濕的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘represent or mean’?

translation.zh-Hant: 這個縮寫代表什麼？

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以燒烤、煎或炙烤方式烹調的厚切牛肉」？

translation.zh-Hant: 他晚餐點了牛排配沙拉。

meaning.en: A thick slice of beef cooked by grilling, frying, or broiling.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以燒烤、煎或炙烤方式烹調的厚切牛肉。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘the market for company shares’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「買賣公司股票的市場」？

example.text: The stock market fell sharply after the announcement.

translation.zh-Hant: 消息公布後，股市大幅下跌。

meaning.en: The market where shares in companies are bought and sold.
meaning.zh-Hant: 買賣公司股票的市場。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘directly forward’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「不向兩側轉彎，直接往前」？

example.text: Go straight ahead for two blocks, then turn left.

translation.zh-Hant: 直走兩個街區，然後左轉。

meaning.en: Directly forward without turning to either side.
meaning.zh-Hant: 不向兩側轉彎，直接往前。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘far too’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「程度遠超過可接受或理想的範圍」？

example.text: This suitcase is way too heavy for the overhead bin.

translation.zh-Hant: 這個行李箱太重了，放不上頭頂置物櫃。

meaning.en: To a much greater degree than is acceptable or desirable.
meaning.zh-Hant: 程度遠超過可接受或理想的範圍。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘that is unfortunate’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來對不幸的情況表達遺憾或失望」？

example.text: What a pity the museum is closed today.

translation.zh-Hant: 真可惜，博物館今天沒開。

meaning.en: Used to express regret or disappointment about an unfortunate situation.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來對不幸的情況表達遺憾或失望。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘very cute’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「非常可愛、迷人或惹人喜愛的」？

example.text: That puppy is absolutely adorable.

translation.zh-Hant: 那隻小狗實在太可愛了。

meaning.en: Very cute, charming, or easy to love.
meaning.zh-Hant: 非常可愛、迷人或惹人喜愛的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘at any time’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在任何時間；只要方便或有需要時都可以」？

example.text: You can call the front desk anytime.

translation.zh-Hant: 你隨時都可以打電話給櫃檯。

meaning.en: At any time, whenever it is convenient or needed.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在任何時間；只要方便或有需要時都可以。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘rely on’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「依靠或信賴某人或某事；預期其會提供幫助或發生」？

example.text: You can count on me to finish the report by Friday.

translation.zh-Hant: 你可以相信我會在星期五前完成報告。

meaning.en: To rely on someone or something, or expect them to help or happen.
meaning.zh-Hant: 依靠或信賴某人或某事；預期其會提供幫助或發生。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘investigate’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「調查、查明或仔細考慮某件事」？

example.text: The manager will look into the billing error today.

translation.zh-Hant: 經理今天會調查帳單錯誤。

meaning.en: To investigate, examine, or consider something.
meaning.zh-Hant: 調查、查明或仔細考慮某件事。
